name: React-Core
authors: Meta Platforms, Inc. and its affiliates

script_phases.name: Copy React public headers
script_phases.script:
FABRIC_SRC="${PODS_ROOT}/React-RCTFabric/packages/react-native/React/Fabric/Mounting/ComponentViews"
PUBLIC_REACT="${PODS_ROOT}/Headers/Public/React"
mkdir -p "$PUBLIC_REACT"
if [ -f "$FABRIC_SRC/RCTFabricComponentsPlugins.h" ]; then cp -f "$FABRIC_SRC/RCTFabricComponentsPlugins.h" "$PUBLIC_REACT/RCTFabricComponentsPlugins.h"; fi
if [ -f "$FABRIC_SRC/View/RCTViewComponentView.h" ]; then cp -f "$FABRIC_SRC/View/RCTViewComponentView.h" "$PUBLIC_REACT/RCTViewComponentView.h"; fi
THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_SRC="${PODS_ROOT}/ReactCodegen/PaciolanSDK/Assets/Codegen/RCTThirdPartyFabricComponentsProvider.h"
if [ -f "$THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_SRC" ]; then cp -f "$THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_SRC" "$PUBLIC_REACT/RCTThirdPartyFabricComponentsProvider.h"; fi
FOLLY_SRC="${PODS_ROOT}/React-Core/packages/react-native/React/CxxUtils"
if [ -f "$FOLLY_SRC/RCTFollyConvert.h" ]; then cp -f "$FOLLY_SRC/RCTFollyConvert.h" "$PUBLIC_REACT/RCTFollyConvert.h"; fi
FB_SPEC_SRC="${PODS_ROOT}/React-Core/packages/react-native/React/FBReactNativeSpec/FBReactNativeSpec"
FB_SPEC_DST="${PODS_ROOT}/Headers/Public/FBReactNativeSpec"
mkdir -p "$FB_SPEC_DST"
if [ -d "$FB_SPEC_SRC" ]; then cp -f "$FB_SPEC_SRC"/*.h "$FB_SPEC_DST"/; fi
TRACE_SRC="${PODS_ROOT}/React-jsinspectortracing/packages/react-native/ReactCommon/jsinspector-modern/tracing"
TRACE_DST="${PODS_ROOT}/Headers/Public/jsinspector-modern/tracing"
mkdir -p "$TRACE_DST"
if [ -d "$TRACE_SRC" ]; then cp -f "$TRACE_SRC"/*.h "$TRACE_DST"/; fi

prepare_command:
ruby - <<'RUBY'
require 'base64'
require 'fileutils'
base = File.join(Dir.pwd, 'packages/react-native/React/FBReactNativeSpec')
dest = File.join(base, 'FBReactNativeSpec')
FileUtils.mkdir_p(dest)
File.binwrite(File.join(dest, 'FBReactNativeSpec.h'), Base64.decode64(''))
File.binwrite(File.join(base, 'FBReactNativeSpec-generated.mm'), Base64.decode64(''))
RUBY
